reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The conversion is incomplete. The JSON explicitly contains an omission marker stating that 38 sections were omitted ('_omitted': '38 sections omitted for token budget'). Comparing the physical page count of the PDF (43 pages) to the sections present in the JSON (only Pages 1, 2, 3, 42, and 43), it is clear that the vast majority of the document's core content—including Enterprise Functions, Boards and Commissions, Budget Report, Goals, and Awards—is entirely missing from the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains 43 pages of content, including sections on Enterprise Functions (p. 4), Budget Report (p. 12), Goals (p. 14), and Awards (p. 31).
concerns.location: Output JSON, between Section 3 and Section 5

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The 'Contents' section (Section 2) is missing a significant portion of its text. Specifically, it has omitted all indented sub-items found in the original Table of Contents on Page 2, such as the eight sub-sections under 'Enterprise Functions and Divisions' and the five sub-sections under 'Boards and Commissions'. This constitutes an omission of more than 50% of the items in this specific section.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The Table of Contents on Page 2 includes 13 sub-items: 'Architecture and Design' through 'Strategy and Governance' (8 items) and 'Information Technology Strategy Board' through 'N.C. Longitudinal Data System Governance Board' (5 items).
concerns.output_quote: The JSON list in Section 2 only includes the 12 primary headings and completely omits the 13 sub-items.

concerns.analysis: Most meaningful images (photos and diagrams like the NC eLink graphic) are present. However, a significant meaningful graphic is missing: the 'Governance structure for the N.C. Health Information Exchange Authority' diagram from page 32. In the HTML output, the text and the caption for this figure are present, but the diagram image itself is absent between them. Additionally, the pie charts on pages 14 and 15 are missing as visual graphics, though their data is represented as text lists.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: On page 32, a complex flowchart/diagram appears above the caption 'The governance structure for the N.C. Health Information Exchange Authority'.
concerns.output_quote: In the HTML screenshot, under the 'HEALTH CARE' section, the text 'NCDHHS’ patient matching was enhanced...' is followed immediately by the caption 'The governance structure for the N.C. Health Information Exchange Authority' with no image rendered in between.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There are minor text discrepancies. On the cover page (Section 1), the specific year of the report ('2021/2022') is missing, which is a critical piece of identifying information for a government report. Additionally, in the signature block of the Secretary's Message (Section 3), the output uses the formal name 'James A. Weaver' while the source text explicitly prints 'Jim Weaver'.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The cover page (Page 1) contains the text '2021/2022' at the top right.

concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains numerous internal and external links. For example, the Table of Contents (p2) links to pages, and there are external links to statutes (p4, p12, p29), executive orders (p9, p12, p26), and journals (p24). The JSON output fails to capture any of these links, providing only plain text for strings that are clearly hyperlinks in the source. This is a failure to capture visible link structures.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Multiple links throughout the document, such as: 'N.C.G.S. 143B, Article 15' (page 4), 'Government Data Analytics Center (GDAC)' (page 7), 'Executive Order 254' (page 9).
concerns.output_quote: The text is present, but no hyperlink metadata or URL properties are included in the 'content' objects.
concerns.location: Throughout the document, e.g., Element 17, Page 4.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
